prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model, assuming a modest positive drift for ACN, a stable large-cap company, over the next 21 trading days, in line with general equity market trends. A daily standard deviation of log returns of approximately 1.2% was used, scaled by the square root of time (sqrt(21 days)) to estimate the volatility over the forecast period. The confidence intervals are derived from a log-normal distribution around the point estimate using standard Z-scores for each confidence level.
